<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Attributes; use Attribute; use Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Shared\ResponseFileTools; #[Attribute(Attribute::IS_REPEATABLE | Attribute::TARGET_FUNCTION | Attribute::TARGET_METHOD | Attribute::TARGET_CLASS)] class ResponseFromFile { public function __construct( public string $file, public int $status = 200, public array|string $merge = [], public ?string $description = '', ) { } public function toArray() { return [ "status" => $this->status, "description" => $this->description, "content" => ResponseFileTools::getResponseContents($this->file, $this->merge) ]; } }
